programs.title: I Died... And Came Back
programs.desc: A woman experiences multiple near death experiences in her lifetime, often returning to the place she calls heaven. Meanwhile, a man dies mid-workout and it takes 6 minutes to restart his heart when he experiences an extra dimensional place.

programs.title: Fishing for History
programs.sub_title: If You Sink It, They Will Come
programs.desc: When historically low water levels in Texas begin to reveal intentionally sunken ships from World War One, Justin and Mike take a trip to the Lone Star State. What they find is a mystery that predates the war and sends Toban to a local museum for help.

programs.title: To Kill a Dictator
programs.desc: Cuba's Fidel Castro leads a revolution against a U.S.-backed dictator; the U.S., fearing the spread of communism, authorizes the CIA to remove Castro through various covert operations; Castro remains in power, defying U.S. efforts for decades.

programs.title: How I Got Here
programs.desc: Twins Ashley and Anthony grapple with the unresolved pain of their mother's decision to leave her homeland of Latvia.

programs.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programs.desc: A pseudoscientific theory embraced by the Nazis claimed their Aryan ancestors had sought refuge in the Himalayas during a mythical cataclysmic ice age.

programs.title: Oracles & Prophets
programs.sub_title: Kingdom of Cults, Presidents Death, Sacred Chickens
programs.desc: A prophecy born on a mountainside ignites the ambitions of a controversial figure, an eerie prediction of inclement weather launches a woman into the spotlight, and the fate of empires hangs in the balance as Romans await the pecks of chickens.
